title: Salty Indian Lentils Dal
description: A light, salty dal that’s perfect for a hangover cure, simmered with fragrant spices and finished with fresh chives.
instructions: Rinse the lentils under cold water until the water runs clear.
Heat the oil in a medium pot over medium heat. Add the cumin seeds and curry leaves; wait until they crackle and release their aroma.
Add the diced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger. Sauté until the onion becomes translucent.
Stir in the chopped tomato and cook until the tomato softens and starts to break down.
Add the lentils and water, then bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Season with kosher salt and ground black pepper; cover and let it simmer, stirring occasionally, until the lentils are tender (about 20–25 minutes).
Taste the dal and adjust seasoning if needed. Fold in the chopped chives, stirring to distribute their flavor.
Serve the dal hot, garnished with a few extra chives for a fresh finish.
